faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About the Gastro Master Website
faq.desc: Have more questions? We're happy to advise you personally — free and non-binding.

items.q: How long does it take to create a website?
items.a: A simple website (one-pager) is usually online within a few days. For comprehensive multi-page sites with custom features, we plan a realistic timeframe together in a [free consultation](/kontakt). Development starts immediately after content approval.

items.q: What's the difference between subscription (€49/month) and one-time purchase?
items.a: With the monthly subscription (from €49/month, minimum contract term 12 months), we permanently handle hosting, domain, technical support and updates. With the one-time purchase (from €990), you acquire the complete website and operate it independently. You can find all options in the [pricing overview](/preise).

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge to maintain my website?
items.a: No. With the monthly subscription, we take care of all technical aspects. Content changes (texts, images, opening hours) are simply coordinated with our team — quickly and easily via WhatsApp or email.

items.q: Can I link my website with the Gastro Master webshop or app?
items.a: Yes. Your Gastro Master website can be seamlessly linked with the [digital ordering system for gastronomy](/produkte/webshop) and the [own ordering app](/produkte/app). Additionally, a [POS system for gastronomy](/produkte/kassensystem) can be added. Customers land on your website and can place an order directly from there — no platform switching.

items.q: What does GDPR-compliant mean, and why is it important?
items.a: GDPR-compliant means your website meets all requirements of the European General Data Protection Regulation: correct legal notice, privacy policy, cookie notice and secure processing of contact form data. Without GDPR compliance, you risk warnings and fines. With us, everything is pre-configured and legally sound.

items.q: Which industries does Gastro Master build websites for?
items.a: Our focus is on gastronomy — specifically for [restaurants](/loesungen/restaurant) and [cafés and bakeries](/loesungen/cafe-baeckerei) — but we build websites for every industry: tradespeople, schools, educational institutions, hotels, service providers, retail and franchise businesses. Each website is individually tailored to the industry and business.

items.q: What's included in the monthly subscription?
items.a: The monthly subscription (from €49/month net, minimum contract term 12 months) includes: professional web design, own domain (e.g. yourbusiness.com), reliable hosting, 2 email accounts, GDPR-compliant setup, technical support and ongoing updates. No hidden costs.
